title: festuca hystricola
intro: Festuca hystricola, also known as the rough fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Festuca hystricola are said to include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Festuca hystricola typically involve drying and infusing the plant in hot water or oil to create teas, tinctures, and topical creams for various health applications.
